title: Static Cursor
description: Forces Minecraft to use the default cursor no matter what you're doing! Reverts cursor changes made in 25w35a.
body: # Archived I did not realise there was already an option in-game to do this. Access the vanilla option in `Options ➜ Controls ➜ Mouse Settings ➜ Allow Cursor Changes` # Static Cursor Forces Minecraft to use the default cursor no matter what you're doing! Reverts cursor changes made in 25w35a. This can make Minecraft menus feel a lot better to use and make it easier to navigate menus faster. # Example ![Static Cursor Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3be259bfdbcb281a880d869903c2ad2a8a259a4.png)
